message:
feat(scheduler): add IntrusiveStack for work-stealing local queues

Implement LIFO intrusive stack complementing the existing FIFO ring:

- IntrusiveStack provides LIFO semantics for the owner thread while
  supporting FIFO stealing by other workers
- Matches cache-locality optimization: recently-pushed work processed
  first by the owner, stolen work processed oldest-first
- Maintains same invariants as IntrusiveRing: len==0 iff top.is_none(),
  all tasks tagged with queue membership

API mirrors IntrusiveRing:
- new(tag), len(), is_empty()
- push/pop for owner (LIFO)
- steal_batch for thieves (FIFO from bottom)

Module export update (mod.rs):
- Export IntrusiveStack alongside existing scheduler types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
